item.name: Authentication

query.description: Required if number is not provided

request.description: Request an OTP via email or phone number. You can provide either email or number.

query.description: Required if email is not provided

request.description: Request an OTP via phone number. This uses Twilio to send SMS.

exec: console.log("Auth ID saved to environment variables");

query.description: Required if number is not provided
The OTP received via email or SMS

request.description: Verify the OTP sent to email. On successful verification, it returns an auth_id that can be used for registration.

exec: console.log("Auth ID saved to environment variables");

query.description: Required if email is not provided
The OTP received via email or SMS

request.description: Verify the OTP sent to mobile number. On successful verification, it returns an auth_id that can be used for registration.
Register a new user using the new registration flow. This creates a user account and sends verification emails with OTP.
Login with existing user credentials
Get current user data

query.description: Email address to send reset password link

request.description: Request a password reset link via email

item.description: Authentication endpoints including registration, login, OTP verification, and password reset

item.name: Company

body.raw:
{
    "company_legal_name": "Example Corp",
    "manager_name": "John Manager",
    "type_of_company": "Real Estate",
    "email_address": "company@example.com",
    "bank_branch": "Main Branch",
    "bank_address": "456 Bank St, City",
    "country": "United States",
    "bank_account_number": "123456789",
    "iban": "US123456789",
    "swift_code": "SWIFT123"
}

request.description: Create new company with bank details
Get company by ID

body.raw:
{
    "company_legal_name": "Updated Corp",
    "manager_name": "Updated Manager",
    "type_of_company": "Updated Real Estate",
    "email_address": "updated@example.com",
    "bank_branch": "Updated Branch",
    "bank_address": "Updated Address",
    "country": "Canada",
    "bank_account_number": "987654321",
    "iban": "CA987654321",
    "swift_code": "SWIFT987"
}

request.description: Update company by ID including bank details
Delete company by ID

item.description: Company management endpoints (now including bank details)

item.name: Properties

query.description: Filter by property classification (1: Sell/Rent, 2: Commercial, 3: New Project, 4: Vacation Homes, 5: Hotel Booking)
Filter by property type (0: Sell, 1: Rent)

request.description: Get a list of properties with optional filtering by property_classification and other parameters. Supports pagination.

formdata.value: Beautiful luxury apartment with amazing views

formdata.description: 1: Sell/Rent, 2: Commercial, 3: New Project, 4: Vacation Homes, 5: Hotel Booking
1: Available Days, 2: Busy Days (Required when property_classification is 4)
JSON array of date ranges (Required when property_classification is 4)
Optional National ID or Passport document

request.description: Create a new property listing with all required fields including the new policy_data (required), weekend_commission (optional), and identity_proof (optional)

formdata.description: 1: Sell/Rent, 2: Commercial, 3: New Project, 4: Vacation Homes, 5: Hotel Booking

Optional National ID or Passport document

request.description: Update an existing hotel property with room modifications and addon packages. Each package contains grouped addon fields with custom pricing options. Supports updating existing packages, creating new ones, and deleting packages via deleted_package_ids array.

item.description: Property management endpoints including the new fields: policy_data (required document except for hotel properties), weekend_commission (optional percentage except for hotel properties), identity_proof (optional image), vacation home fields (availability_type and available_dates), and hotel booking fields (refund_policy, hotel_rooms)

request.description: Get system settings

item.name: Hotel Room Types

request.description: Get all active hotel room types
Create a new hotel room type (requires authentication)
Get all hotel room types (requires authentication)
Update an existing hotel room type (requires authentication)
Delete a hotel room type (requires authentication)

item.description: Hotel room type management endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting room types

item.name: Hotel Addon Fields

request.description: Get all active hotel addon fields with their values. This endpoint returns fields with their types and associated values including pricing options (static_price and multiply_price).

response.name: Success Response

item.description: Hotel addon fields endpoints for retrieving custom fields for hotel properties. These fields can be used to add additional options and pricing to hotel properties.

item.name: Hotel Rooms

query.description: Start date for availability search (format: YYYY-MM-DD)
End date for availability search (format: YYYY-MM-DD)
Optional: Filter by room type ID

request.description: Search for available hotel rooms based on date range, room type, and property. The endpoint handles two types of availability: 'available_days' (dates when the room is available) and 'busy_days' (dates when the room is NOT available).
Get all hotel rooms (requires authentication)
Get a specific hotel room by ID (requires authentication)
Create a new hotel room (requires authentication). The available_dates field uses date ranges in the format [{"from":"YYYY-MM-DD","to":"YYYY-MM-DD"}].
Update an existing hotel room (requires authentication). The available_dates field uses date ranges in the format [{"from":"YYYY-MM-DD","to":"YYYY-MM-DD"}].
Delete a hotel room by ID (requires authentication)

item.description: Hotel room management endpoints including search, create, read, update, and delete operations. The search endpoint allows finding available rooms based on date range, room type, and property.

item.name: Addons Packages

query.description: Optional: Filter packages by property ID

request.description: Get all addons packages with their addon values. Can be filtered by property_id.
Get a specific addons package by ID with its addon values
Create a new addons package with addon values. Each addon value must reference a valid hotel addon field.
Update an existing addons package. Can update package details and addon values. Set delete_missing_values to true to remove addon values not included in the request.
Delete an addons package and its associated addon values

item.description: Addons packages endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting packages of hotel addon options. Each package contains a set of addon values that can be applied to hotel properties.
